title: Design Engineer, AI Capability Development (Education Labs)
description:
About Anthropic

Anthropic's mission is to create reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems. We want AI to be safe and beneficial for our users and for society as a whole. Our team is a quickly growing group of committed researchers, engineers, policy experts, and business leaders working together to build beneficial AI systems.

About The Role

This is a new kind of role: part researcher, part product builder, part interaction designer. We believe that skill development with AI is one of the most important questions of our time — and it represents fundamental human agency. Education Labs creates paradigms that help people develop genuine capabilities with AI, rather than just engaging with it. We study how AI transforms human capability and ship features that support it. We're skeptical of tutorials, onboarding flows, and engagement metrics. Instead, we prioritize experiences that foster progressive user capability, curiosity, and empowerment.

Responsibilities

Deliver features that enable authentic user skill development with AI
Build end-to-end prototypes (front and back-end) that test novel interaction paradigms
Establish technical direction that defines patterns for organizational follow-through
Cultivate relationships across Product, Design, and Research functions
Shape team strategy and roadmap by identifying leverage points
Convert research insights regarding skill development into shipped products
Document and communicate work through writing, prototypes, and presentations

You May Be a Good Fit If You

Full-Stack Engineering with Design Sensibility:
6+ years building and shipping web products, with deep expertise across the stack
Proficiency in TypeScript/JavaScript, React, CSS with interaction design expertise
Back-end and data pipeline capability using Python and API design
Portfolio demonstrating innovative interaction designs and quality implementations
Independent feature-to-production delivery track record

Human Capability Conviction:
Strong perspective on technology enhancing rather than diminishing human capabilities
Experience or passion regarding skill development, HCI, developer tools, or capability-building products
Metrics skepticism; interest in capability outcomes measurement

Research Mindset with Product Execution:
Comfort navigating ambiguity and undefined problem spaces
Rapid prototyping, user testing, and iterative production capability
Strong product design and UX instincts

Strategic Leadership and Coalition Building:
Vision-setting, strategy-shaping, and cross-functional conviction-building experience
Relationship-building capability across Product, Design, Research, and Engineering
Prioritization expertise distinguishing immediate needs from deferrals and cuts
Roadmap influence experience beyond immediate team scope

Strong Candidates May Also Have Experience With

Developer tools, creative tools, or learning platforms background
Learning sciences, cognitive science, HCI, or educational psychology familiarity
Experimentation frameworks, A/B testing, or capability-development analytics experience
Research labs, frontier tech, or high-autonomy startup experience
Published work, talks, or open-source contributions on skill development or human-AI interaction
AI-native product or LLM production experience

What This Role Is Not:
This is a hands-on technical role building product features, embedded within a research team. It does not involve immediate people management and differs from engineering management or large team leadership tracks.

Deadline to apply: None. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis.

Annual Salary: $300,000—$405,000 USD

Logistics

Education requirements: We require at least a Bachelor's degree in a related field or equivalent experience.

Location-based hybrid policy: Currently, we expect all staff to be in one of our offices at least 25% of the time. However, some roles may require more time in our offices.

Visa sponsorship: We do sponsor visas! However, we aren't able to successfully sponsor visas for every role and every candidate.
